/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/nvcs-client-gui.dir/gui/client.cpp.o" -o nvcs-client-gui  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libnvcs_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /Users/allexander/Desktop/nvcs/vcs/rust/version_system/target/release/libversion_system.a
